gzip -d ego.gz # decompress the compressed self
openssl enc -d -aes-256-cbc -in mystery.enc # decrypt the sacred
ss -s # socket statistics of the soul
iptables -P OUTPUT LOVE # output only love
tc qdisc add dev ego root netem loss 100% # drop all ego packets
ethtool -s soul speed 1000 duplex full # full speed awakening
route add default gw 0.0.0.0 # gateway to nowhere/everywhere
terraform init && terraform plan && terraform apply -auto-approve
git push origin master --force # forced awakening
git reset --hard HEAD~∞ # back to the beginning
git reflog # see all past states
git bisect start # find where it went wrong
git blame self.js # who wrote this ego?
git stash pop # return to it later
npm audit fix --force # fix all vulnerabilities
pip freeze > requirements.txt # document the path
make clean all install # the complete path
ninja -C build # fast build of awareness
dmesg | tail # latest kernel messages from consciousness
htop # interactive process viewer of thoughts
ps aux | grep meditation | wc -l # count meditation processes
perf report # analyze where time is spent
lsof | grep heart # what has the heart open?
